changes.after: The wheel-inside-wheel sigil on eleven depots.

changes.before: "Not cleanly." / "I can see the first three steps."
changes.after: "I can give you the first three steps." / "The last one is still dark."

changes.before: Bread made the cruelty intimate.
changes.after: The cruelty reached people through bread.

changes.before: Orders moving fast enough that nobody repeated them.
changes.after: Runners and officers were moving fast enough that nobody repeated an order.

changes.before: The marked depots, the cleaned shelves, the blank books, the dead man at Millbrook Spur without a wound, the Barov name appearing too often to ignore and still not often enough to prove.
changes.after: The tagged depots, the cleaned shelves, the blank books, the dead man at Millbrook Spur without a wound, the Barov name appearing too often to ignore and still not often enough to prove.

changes.before: It only made the refusal gathering in the room feel more exact.
changes.after: [deleted]

changes.before: Command does that in the field.
changes.after: Commanders do that in the field.

changes.before: Jaina had gone in believing a clean argument, laid out cleanly, would force the room to yield.
changes.after: Jaina had gone in believing a clean argument, laid out cleanly, would force Arthas to yield.

changes.before: Two men on two roads using the same farewell was enough to mark it.
changes.after: Two men on two roads using the same farewell was enough to flag it.

changes.before: It rode the breath.
changes.after: It came in with every breath.

changes.before: The towers were full and feeding the road.
changes.after: The towers were full, and wagons were still pulling grain out toward the road.

changes.before: A pressure that had soaked into the place so thoroughly it moved with the ordinary labor of it: flour in sacks, ledgers, bakers, carts, clerks, all of it doing the day's work over a center that should have sent every bell in Lordaeron ringing.
changes.after: The pressure had soaked so deeply into the place that flour in sacks, ledgers, bakers, carts, and clerks all carried it through the day's work.

changes.before: Every depot they had traced, every mark copied from a ledger, every village that had sickened without understanding why—all of it pointed here, and here was a functioning node in plain sight.
changes.after: Every depot they had traced, every symbol copied from a ledger, every village that had sickened without understanding why—all of it pointed here, and here was a functioning node in plain sight.

changes.before: A camp would wait for orders.
changes.after: Soldiers in camp would wait for orders.

changes.before: She knew every mark on it.
changes.after: She knew every notation on it.

changes.before: Jaina could hear the rest of her meaning clearly enough.
changes.after: The rest of her meaning was clear enough.

changes.before: It only made the refusal gathering in the room feel more exact.

changes.before: He looked up.
changes.after: He raised his head.

changes.before: That was the proof Arthas had refused.
changes.after: This was what she had tried to give him: towers full, wagons loading, a city still working.

changes.before: Instead the years between them had served only to make the refusal courteous.
changes.after: Instead the years between them had only made the refusal sound courteous.

changes.before: Sylvanas recognized the phrase a beat late.
changes.after: Sylvanas went still a beat late.

changes.before: Sylvanas trusted some part of hers.
changes.after: Sylvanas rode with the stillness of a woman weighing it.

changes.before: What they were reading now was the pressure building mile by mile.
changes.after: The horses kept that posture as the miles fell away.

changes.before: It mounted by grains, too gradual for any single adjustment to master.
changes.after: It built by grains. Each time she tightened the ward, the ache slipped past it again.

changes.before: That was the proof Arthas had refused.
changes.after: This was what she had tried to give him: towers full, wagons loading, a city still working.

changes.before: "He's applying the right logic to the wrong fire."
changes.after: "He's treating the raiders as the war and the plague as somebody else's problem."

changes.before: "He does not take the thing seriously yet."
changes.after: "He takes you seriously. The plague still comes second."

changes.before: Just the broad shove of a center that had been feeding itself outward for weeks.
changes.after: Only the pull of one source somewhere ahead, feeding taint out through every road.

changes.before: That was the proof Arthas had refused.
changes.after: This was what she had tried to give him: towers full, wagons loading, a city still working.
